description: Amplifies weapon and skill damage by 15% to pulsed and tracked enemies.
Critical hits increase total weapon damage by 1% for 5 seconds. Stacks up to 25 times.
Killing an enemy grants +5% weapon damage for 10 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times (25% max). Refreshes on kill.
When your armor breaks, repair 50% of your armor. Armor kits used within 5 seconds repair 100% armor. Cooldown: 55 seconds.
Skills in motion gain 1% increased damage and repair every second. Max 15 stacks. Stacks reset when the skill stops moving.
+25% amplified weapon and skill damage. +50% amplified damage taken.
While you have bonus armor, gain +10% amplified weapon damage to enemies within 15 meters.
After being in cover for 10 seconds, weapon and skill damage is increased by 12% for you and all allies. Canceled by leaving cover.
Repairing an ally grants them +3% weapon and skill damage for each percent of armor repaired. Max 15%. Lasts 10 seconds.
After killing an enemy with a headshot, your next weapon hit within 30 seconds deals 125% of the enemy's max health as headshot damage. Damage is capped to 800% weapon damage.
